page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: HIST419B or HIST361.

Formerly: HIST419B.

HIST363 Mobility in History: Planes, Trains, Automobiles (3 Credits) From walking, bicycling, riding ships and trains to driving cars and

to flying: Humans and their modes of transportation have changed dramatically in history. In this class, students will explore the social, cultural, and environmental aspects of passenger and freight transportation in the 19th and 20th centuries. The focus is on the societal expectations and imaginations that have shaped how humans move about.

Credit Only Granted for. HIST329X or HIST363.
